news.title: Cross-campus collaboration leads to materials breakthrough
news.summary_en: Materials change shape when warmed, making them useful for wearable sensors and wound treatment.

news.title: Photo gallery: Spring commencement 2026
news.summary_en: The University of Missouri celebrated the many accomplishments of nearly 6,000 Tigers across three days of commencement ceremonies. See photos from the weekend's festivities.

news.title: A cancer-fighting breakthrough gets a boost as Mizzou automates production
news.summary_en: Proof-of-concept study creates a blueprint for producing prostate cancer treatment more efficiently.
